chapters.title: Chapter 1046 - I’Ll Kill Them All!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1046 - I’Ll Kill Them All!

Chapter 1046: I’ll Kill Them All!

The next day, the Four Great Continents were raging like a storm. Xu Que’s Message-Delivering Spells announced his return to this world, which also startled those families and sects that Xu Que used to offend.

Now, most of these families and sects threw themselves into the laps of the Celestials. They moved out overnight with great momentum. They announced to the world that they had vowed to eradicate the rest of the members of the Exploding Heavens Faction and kill Xu Que!

The members of the Exploding Heavens Faction who were hiding in the Four Great Continents rushed toward the South Continent secretly. They planned to seek shelter with Xu Que. They planned to join Xu Que, so that they could defeat their enemies to vent their grievances and anger accumulated during all these years that Xu Que was away.

This day was bound to be an extraordinary day! Everybody was moving toward the South Continent. Xu Que’s enemies who were already in the South Continent were much faster.

The Heaven Horn Ox Tribe had a branch in the South Continent. After hearing Xu Que’s message, they sent several Celestials to check out Xu Que’s position immediately.

“Master, please be sure to kill Xu Que! He has numerous treasures, and you will absolutely find what you want!”

“Never underestimate him! He realized a remarkable progress in his cultivation by reaching the Infant Transformation Stage from the Original Infant Stage within one year! After that, he destroyed his cultivation achievements. Then he regained his peak state by reaching the Void Training Stage within three years!”

“Exactly! He must have a lot of treasures! Also he knows a powerful magic art which could attack his enemy with his Taoist Connotation. He used to kill powerhouses at the Form Synthesis Stage when he was at the Void Training Stage!”

“He has disappeared for more than ten years! It is said that he went to the Celestial World. Now, he has returned. I’m afraid he has also reached the Celestial Realm. Please be careful!”

On their way, members of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe kept providing advice to the young Celestials respectfully. These young Celestials were in Taoist robes. A golden word “Ivy” was embroidered on their sleeves. All of them had reached the Half Celestial Realm!

When they were walking, their feet didn’t touch the ground. Their movements were so flexible that they were like deities in plumes of smoke! Among them, the male Celestials were so handsome and the female Celestials were extremely beautiful!

“According to your report, this guy is really extraordinary!” A woman, who was very graceful and attractive, said at this time. Her voice was just like silver bells.

A man beside her also said, nodding his head, “He destroyed his cultivation achievements and regained peak state within three months! Even in the World of Near Celestial, he would be deemed a genius! I guess he realized this accomplishment in this place with a treasure!”

The rest of the people said with disdainful smiles, “Heh, heh, we don’t care whether he has treasures or not! He will never rival us as long as his cultivation stage is lower than the Human Celestial Realm!”

“The Human Celestial Realm? That’s impossible! No matter how talented he is, he could reach the Half Celestial Realm like us at most within a dozen years!”

“Hah, hah! We don’t need to waste our words here! Since we’ve got an order, let’s just chop off his head!”

Then they picked up speed by turning themselves into smoke.

Seeing that, members of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe were quite excited.

Xu Que killed their Holy Son and ruined their plan to seize the Living Holy Water from the Mystery Land, which made their tribe a laughingstock of this world. When an opportunity for revenge was in front of them, how could they stay calm?

“Hah, hah! Xu Que, you will die today even if you have become a Celestial!”

Members of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe laughed as they walked forward following the young Celestials.

…..

At the same time, in a place close to the Mystery Land in the South Continent, Xu Que was sitting on the ground with his legs crossed and his eyes closed. An Eight-Star sword and a broken sword were floating in front of him. A strand of black fog was gushing out from the Eight-Star sword into the broken sword.

This was at the request of the Sword Spirit. It was quite sensitive to swords. It even sensed Xu Que had such a powerful broken sword, which was extorted from the Refined Moon Palace. This broken sword was an inferior Celestial Artifact, which was much more advanced than the Eight-Star sword.

“Sister Hongyan, is this Sword Spirit a ghost? Why does it choose that broken sword instead of this sharp sword?” Seeing that, Xu Feifei couldn’t help but ask Jiang Hongyan.

Jiang Hongyan replied with a faint smile, “This broken sword is an Inferior Celestial Artifact, which is much more powerful than those ordinary swords. The more powerful a sword is, the more lethal a Sword Spirit in it will be! Your brother is going to face extremely powerful enemies. So, he has to confront them with his peak state. This Sword Spirit is one of his lethal weapons!”

“Now I know!” Xu Feifei nodded her head.

“What? It seems some people are approaching. I don’t know whether they are hostile. Buttface, go there and…. Wait! Where is Buttface?” Jiang Hongyan was shocked to not see Buttface and never finished her words.

Buttface had disappeared, and she didn’t sense that at all.

“Right! How could Buttface disappear?” Xu Feifei also said in surprise.

At this time, the toy poodle raised his head and said breathlessly, “He…he said he is going to run away because he doesn’t like swords. He doesn’t want to have conflicts with the Sword Spirit for he could hurt it!”

“He doesn’t…like swords?” Xu Feifei said with embarrassment.

Jiang Hongyan said as she shook her head with a smile, “I guess he left secretly because he is scared of the Sword Spirit!”

“What the hell? Why do we have such a cowardly dog?” Xu Feifei said in embarrassment.

“Feifei, stay behind me! A lot of people are approaching, and I don’t know whether they are hostile!” Jiang Hongyan said gently at this time. She stood in front of Xu Feifei and fixed her beautiful eyes on a wooded mountain in the distance. She sensed more than ten people were running toward them. However, all these people were not powerful for they were just at the Infant Transformation Stage and the Void Training Stage. Therefore, she didn’t worry about threats from these people.

Whoosh!

Soon, more than ten figures appeared on the mountain, moving toward them vigilantly.

Jiang Hongyan spotted them immediately. It seemed these people were also checking out the situation in this area. Then they came running out, shouting with joy.

“Faction Leader!”

“My lady!”

“We are members of the Exploding Heavens Faction! Finally, we have found you!”

“Great! Both the Faction Leader and his wife are back!”

“Look! More than ten years have passed, and our Faction Leader is still so handsome and graceful! The black fog above his head is definitely an extraordinary magic art!”

“According to the aura of this black fog, I guess the Faction Leader has also reached the Celestial Realm!”

“We’re saved!”

These people murmured excitedly as they walked out from the forest.

Buzz!

Almost at the same time, the black fog above Xu Que’s head disappeared. The Eight-Star sword fell to the ground and became ashes. The antique broken sword started to vibrate violently with a piercing sound. The next moment, the rust stains on the sword started to fall off rapidly. A brand-new, sharp sword edge could be seen. Even though this sword was broken, a magnificent and horrible killing intent and aura still gushed out from it as if it could cut off anything in this world.

Seeing that, those newly arrived members of the Exploding Heavens Faction stopped and started to watch the sword, holding their breath reverently.

“The momentum of this sword is so strong!”

“When did our Faction Leader start to use a sword?”

“Could it be that…he has become the legendary Sword Celestial?”

Those people were murmuring in low voices as their eyes lit up excitedly.

“Nonsense!” Xu Que stood up at this time. He put away the broken sword as he looked at the members of the Exploding Heavens Faction. When the broken sword was put away, the sword sound disappeared together with that horrible killing intent, which could make people feel chilliness on their backs.

Xu Que’s cultivation stage, the Crossing Calamity Stage, was displayed clearly.

“What?”

“This….”

Those members of the Exploding Heavens Faction were shocked. Their expressions were frozen on their faces.

The Crossing Calamity Stage?

How could the Faction Leader be at the Crossing Calamity Stage after disappearing for so many years?

This is impossible! Our Faction Leader used to realize rapid progress in cultivation stages. How could he be just at the Crossing Calamity Stage?

How can he confront the Celestials?

How could he make trouble in this way?

Oh, no! We are doomed! We’ve boarded the wrong ship!

All of a sudden, the members of the Exploding Heavens Faction fell into despair. The excited expressions on their faces had already been replaced by despair and helplessness!

They regained confidence, not only because of Xu Que’s return, but also because of Xu Que’s strength and talents! They thought Xu Que would definitely come back as a Celestial! However, they never expected Xu Que was just at Level 4 of the Crossing Calamity Stage!

“Hey! How dare you look at me in this way! Why do you change your expressions? Why are you so disappointed in me?” Xu Que shouted at those people.

“Faction Leader, this time you really…fooled all of us!” A member said miserably.

“Holy crap! Why do you say that?” Xu Que was seriously confused.

Those members said with embarrassment, “Faction Leader, your Message- Delivering Spell gave a boost to our morale. We thought you had reached the Celestial Realm. So we came here to join you!”

“Our enemies are countless Celestials! How can we defeat them in this way?”

“Ah! We are doomed! I’m afraid all of us will be eradicated together!”

…..

“Shut up!” Xu Que yelled immediately. “You are a bunch of cowards! How dare you say you are members of the Exploding Heavens Faction! Who introduced you into our faction?”

The people replied together, “The Vice Faction Leader Buttface!”

“He is nothing! OK, I asked you to join me because I am able to protect you! As for those Celestials, I will kill them all!” Xu Que said with a smile.

When he had just arrived at this place, he talked tough but he was not confident at all. When he obtained the Firestorm Wheels, he was more confident, for at least he could ensure his own safety. Now, he had awakened the Sword Spirit and put it into that broken sword. After talking with the Sword Spirit, Xu Que was very confident.

Celestials?

Heh, heh, I will kill all of them!

Boom!

At this time, several sounds of explosions came in from the sky in the distance. Plumes of blue smoke, which had covered the sky like canes, were sweeping over toward them.

Instantly, the sky was covered by a totem of ivy. Several figures walked out from the totem. Behind them, dozens of powerhouses of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe also descended!

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1047 - The Bad Guys Always Die Because Of Being Too Talkative!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1047 - The Bad Guys Always Die Because Of Being Too Talkative!

Chapter 1047: The Bad Guys Always Die Because of Being Too Talkative!

“Wow! Speak of the devil and he comes!” Xu Que looked up and squinted with a faint smile.

In the sky, the green vines that had appeared from the green mist were quite magnificent. Several young figures in green robes descended from the sky. Behind them, dozens of powerhouses from the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe were following in a threatening manner. They were led by a handsome man. After glancing at Xu Que and his teammates, he fixed his eyes on Jiang Hongyan. Then he was stunned.

I didn’t expect that such a gorgeous woman would appear in this small place! She is even more beautiful than those Holy Virgins at those legacy places!

The handsome man was totally tempted. At first sight, he was sure this woman was the most beautiful woman he had seen in his life, more attractive than any Celestial Artifacts. He would do his best to get this woman!

Boom!

Instantly, they landed, but their feet didn’t touch the ground. All of them were wrapped by magnificent green mists. The Spiritual Qi in this area also rushed to them like myriad of stars surround the moon. They didn’t attract the Spiritual Qi deliberately. The Spiritual Qi was attracted by their Taoist Connotation.

Although the Half-Celestial Realm was only one stage higher than the Great Vehicle Stage, cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm had stepped over the threshold of Celestial. Therefore, they were much more powerful than cultivators at the Great Vehicle Stage.

“We are doomed!” At the same time, members of the Exploding Heavens Faction turned pale immediately. They knew clearly how powerful these Celestials were. In short, these Celestials could kill anyone whose cultivation stage was lower than the Celestial Realm easily like killing an ant!

Even though they were confident about Xu Que’s strength, they were in a panic now. After all, Xu Que had just reached the Crossing Calamity Stage. Above the Crossing Calamity Stage, there was still the Great Vehicle Stage. He was two stages lower than these Celestials. How could he fight this combat? He was definitely seeking death!

“My Celestial Masters, these are the remaining evil elements of the Exploding Heavens Faction. That toy boy in the black robe is the prime evil, Xu Que!” At this time, the powerhouses of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe gave reports to the young men and women. They even described Xu Que as a toy boy.

Xu Que replied with an enthusiastic smile immediately, “Thank you! Most people don’t praise my handsomeness in this way! Thanks!”

“Humph!” The powerhouses of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe didn’t want to waste time on Xu Que. For them, Xu Que would definitely be killed this time.

Members of the Exploding Heavens Faction twitched their lips. After so many years, their Faction Leader still acted wickedly regardless of the occasion.

“The Faction Leader…of the Exploding Heavens Faction?” At this time, among those young men and women, the handsome man turned to Xu Que and started to smile in a sarcastic and disdainful way.

Another young woman stepped forward and shook her head after looking at Xu Que, “So, you are Xu Que, who is the big devil, right? It seems they have overestimated you. You have just reached the Crossing Calamity Stage. It was unnecessary for us to send so many people here to kill you!”

After saying that, the woman glanced at those powerhouses of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe coldly.

Flop! Those powerhouses of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe changed their expressions and knelt down on the ground. Then they shouted in terror, “Please forgive us, Celestial Masters! We…we haven’t seen him for many years. So we overestimated his strength out of discretion!”

“Forget it! Although it is a waste of manpower to do so, we have been quite bored recently, and it is good to kill time with something!” The young woman said quietly.

“Thank you, Master Ning!” The powerhouses of the Heaven Horn Ox Tribe let out a sigh of relief as they expressed their gratitude by kowtowing. At the same time, their hearts were filled with wild joy.

None of them expected that Xu Que, who was so gifted, had only reached the Crossing Calamity Stage after more than ten years.

What does that mean? It means he is nothing in front of these Celestials!

“Ahem, are you those so-called Celestials? Where are you from?” At this time, Xu Que cleared his throat and asked with a smile. He had sensed from their auras that they had just reached the Half-Celestial Realm. Some of them were just at the Initial Stage of the Half-Celestial Realm. That handsome man, who had reached the Medium Stage of the Half-Celestial Realm, was the most powerful one among them.

“You are quite calm! It seems you have met people at our realm!” The handsome man said as he looked at Xu Que thoughtfully.

Except for fools, only a quite powerful and confident man could be so calm in front of them. His instinct told him that Xu Que was not a fool.

“I’ve met people like you! And I’ve even killed some of them! They were quite weak!” Xu Que replied with a smile. What he said was true and also contained some bluffing factors! Indeed, he had killed cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm and the Human Celestial Realm in the Refined Moon Palace. However, restricted by the rules in that place, those people were just at the level of the Great Vehicle Stage or lower. So, Xu Que managed to kill them easily.

Now, when cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm who were not restricted by the rules were standing in front of him, Xu Que knew clearly how big the gap between him and them was. Maybe he was not able to cause a scratch on these people even if he used the King of Tough-Acting Fist with 50,000 Acting Tough Points or even 100,000 Acting Tough Points! Because the gap between Xu Que and these people was not only the True Core Strength but also the Taoist Connotation.

Although Xu Que’s Taoist Connotation was quite powerful, his Taoist Connotation was not solid enough. These Celestials were just the opposite. Xu Que’s Taoist Connotation was like a newly born lion cub. The Taoist Connotation of these cultivators at the Half Celestial Realm was like a mature boar.

After some time, the lion cub would become a powerful lion. But now, a mature boar could kill a newly born lion cub easily. However, Xu Que was not worried at all! His Firestorm Wheels was an awesome Celestial Artifact that could help him to escape or chase his enemies easily. He also had a Sword Spirit!

Before the arrival of these cultivators at the Half Celestial Realm, the Sword Spirit had left some words of advice to Xu Que, “You can kill a cultivator whose cultivation stage is lower than the Human Celestial Realm with just one sword! Even if a cultivator at the Human Celestial Realm couldn’t be killed with one sword,two swords will be enough!” These words were quite tough, which also revealed the current strength of his Sword Spirit.

The Sword Spirit told Xu Que that he could kill cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm with one sword instantly. For cultivators at the Human Celestial Realm, two or three swords were enough. But it didn’t mention cultivators at the Earth Celestial Realm. Maybe because the Sword Spirit hadn’t regained its full strength yet. Also, the quality of this broken sword also restrained the strength of the Sword Spirit!

“Really? You used to kill cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm? Heh, heh!”

Hearing that, these young men and women couldn’t help but smile sarcastically at this time.

Could a cultivator at the Crossing Calamity Stage kill cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm? This was totally impossible and even absurd to them!

“Yes! No matter whether you believe it or not, I have done it before!” Xu Que replied with a smile.

The handsome man said, shaking his head, “I don’t want to waste more words on you. You know clearly what we are going to do here. However, you are quite different than many people we have met in this world! It seems you are quite confident. Tell me, where are you from? I am trying to avoid some misunderstandings in the future!”

The handsome man was quite straightforward. He knew Xu Que’s confidence was authentic. Therefore, before launching an attack, he wanted to know Xu Que’s background and the power behind Xu Que, so that he could judge and weigh whether he could afford to offend him.

“Me? I remember you’ve mentioned it before! I am Xu Que, Faction Leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction!” Xu Que said with a calm smile.

He had transferred the Sword Spirit into the broken sword which was an Inferior Celestial Artifact. However, the Sword Spirit needed some time for its rehabilitation in the new sword. Before that, he didn’t want to attack. If the Sword Spirit had finished its rehabilitation, he wouldn’t have wasted so many words. When the handsome man stared at Jiang Hongyan, he would have already attacked with the sword.

“Heh, heh, since you don’t want to tell us your background, don’t blame us! Before our attack, I want to tell you that we are from the Ivy Academy of the World of Near Celestial!” The handsome man said with a smile. Kill intent appeared in his eyes. Apparently, he was about to attack.

Hearing that, Xu Que was stunned a bit, “Hah, you are also from the World of Near Celestial! What a coincidence! The people I killed before were also from the World of Near Celestial! Also, I know the Holy Virgin of the Jade Lake…wait!”

Before finishing his words, Xu Que paused a bit. Then, a strand of a smile appeared on his face. The Sword Spirit had finished its rehabilitation in the broken sword! Finally, I don’t need to waste time anymore!

“The Holy Virgin of the Jade Lake? Do you really know the Holy Virgin of the Jade Lake?” At this time, these young men and women changed their expressions and started to look at Xu Que in surprise.

“Heh, heh, it’s none of your business! By the way, I don’t know whether you’ve heard of a saying?” Then Xu Que started to smile brazenly, “The bad guys always die because of being too talkative!”

Clang! After saying that, Xu Que pulled out the broken sword!

A cloud of horrible momentum, which could destroy everything in the area, gushed out from the broken sword and swept over the area!

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1049 - You Are Too Short!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1049 - You Are Too Short!

Chapter 1049: You Are Too Short!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

In the sky, Xu Que’s Firestorm Wheels created a lot of noise and were really quite deafening! However, the noises were much slower than the Firestorm Wheels. At this moment, the noises could be heard on this side. But Xu Que would appear on the other side. Therefore, it was impossible to track Xu Que through the noise. The powerhouses at the Half-Celestial Realm failed to find Xu Que even after using all their Soul Strength!

Swash!

Along with a crisp sound, a man who was protected by protective Spiritual Qi was cut in half and died immediately.

The broken sword was way too horrible!

As the Sword Spirit said, cultivators whose cultivation stage was lower than the Human Celestial Realm could be killed by one sword instantly, even when they were protected by protective magic arts!

Gasp! Another…Celestial was killed!

The other people in the area looked up and gasped in terror. Those Celestials who were so mighty and invincible in the Four Great Continents were being chased by the Faction Leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction! This was so amazing and extraordinary!

“Hey! Don’t run! This is so boring! You can’t escape from me. But you can try to escape in different directions. It is quite difficult for me to catch up with you!” Xu Que complained.

Although he was faster now, he was still not as fast as a powerhouse at the Earth Celestial Realm which was mentioned in the description of the Firestorm Wheels. After all, he was just at the Crossing Calamity Stage and didn’t have enough True Core Strength to feed his Celestial Artifacts!

Even if he had acquired the Ancient Five Elemental Arts, which bestowed him a lot of True Core Strength, he still had to activate the Automatic Recovery Function of the System to supply True Core Strength to the Firestorm Wheels. But he was not able to realize the full strength of the Firestorm Wheels even in this way. He guessed he could realize 50 percent of the Firestorm Wheels’ full speed at most!

Therefore, he was just a little bit faster than those powerhouses at the Half-Celestial Realm. In other words, he was just as fast as a cultivator at the Initial Stage of the Human Celestial Realm. So, it was quite difficult for him to kill those people in a short time! They were running in all different directions. If Xu Que chased one of them, the rest would escape. One or two of them might run back to inform their academy. Then he would have to confront dozens of cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm or even the powerhouses at the Human Celestial Realm!

This was not the situation wanted by Xu Que. When he had to confront a lot of powerful enemies, he didn’t want to take any risks. Also, he didn’t want to kill his enemies immediately for it would waste a lot of opportunities to act tough!

Now, he was badly in need of Acting Tough Points. Therefore, Xu Que tried to treat those Celestials who had descended on the Four Great Continents as a flock of sheep. He would kill them one by one, so that he could maximize his Acting Tough Points with minimum risks!

So, after killing two powerhouses at the Half-Celestial Realm, Xu Que changed his plan. He started to fly around the rest of the Celestials to reduce the scope where they could escape!

“Don’t run away! What you are doing now is so boring!” Xu Que shouted again as he continued to fly around them to stop them from escaping in different directions! Those young men and women didn’t know what to do.

On the one hand, they were slower than Xu Que; on the other hand, they didn’t dare to stay close to Xu Que. So, they had to run desperately like headless chickens!

“Xu Que, if you dare to kill us, the Ivy Academy will never let you go!”

“Our Masters at the Human Celestial Realm are very close to the South Continent. You’d better not do anything reckless!” These young men and women shouted loudly. They knew their life was endangered, for Xu Que had started to reduce the ring of encirclement.

Once the surrounding circle was small enough, all of them would be killed by that broken sword!

“I didn’t do anything reckless! Now, I am fighting with my back at the wall! I am outnumbered by you! What else do you want from me?” Xu Que shouted severely as he kept reducing the ring of encirclement by flying around those people crazily.

The young men and women from the Ivy Academy darkened their faces.

You are outnumbered?

You are fighting with your back to the wall?

F*ck! How could you say that?

You are fighting with two Celestial Artifacts. Even if we have dozens of cultivators at the Half-Celestial Realm here, all of us will be killed by you at last!

“What? Wait! This is not correct!” Suddenly, a man’s eyes lit up as if an idea had occurred to him.

He turned to his companions and shouted, “Our plan is wrong! This guy is just at the Crossing Calamity Stage, no matter how lethal he is!”

“We know that!” His companions shouted.

The man took out a long halberd and said by shaking his head, “We were intimidated by his momentum. This guy is just at the Crossing Calamity Stage. But he is too fast! We can just run away! We should attack as a means of defense!”

“What?”

His words dawned on his companions immediately.

When the handsome man and the one who was protected by protective Spiritual Qi were cut in half, they were totally terrified and escaped directly without considering the counterattack!

Now, this man reminded them. Anyway, Xu Que was just at the Crossing Calamity Stage, which was quite fragile. Even they couldn’t track Xu Que in the sky, they could keep Xu Que from approaching them as long as they kept using magic arts around them.

“Humph! Let’s attack!”

Then they shouted and launched a counterattack.

One of them waved his long halberd to turn the Spiritual Qi around him into a shiny protective shell.

Another one wrapped himself in a sea of fire as he dashed forward.

…..

In this way, they managed to push Xu Que back. Although they couldn’t track Xu Que in the sky, their close combat magic arts at the Half-Celestial Realm could keep Xu Que away from them effectively.

Xu Que could kill them with one sword. Also, they could kill Xu Que with one move. In this way, Xu Que’s fast attack was useless. After all, the broken sword was too short!

“D*mn! Sword Spirit, why can’t you be any longer? You would be more effective if you were just a bit longer!” Xu Que was quite anxious for he didn’t expect his only defect had been found by his opponents!

Now, the ring of encirclement had become larger and larger. After a short while, he wouldn’t be able to surround them at all. He could kill one or two of them at most. The rest of them would definitely run away!

“Humph! How ignorant you are! Have you seen a sword that long?” The Sword Spirit snorted immediately. After all, it was still quite proud of its experience of following the Immortal Emperor before!

Xu Que was annoyed immediately. He said, “I’ve seen a sword more than 300 yards long. When I crossed the Heavenly Tribulation, the sword formed by the golden lightning was over 300 yards long!”

“OK, you could find a sword at the level of the Celestial Artifact which was three yards long for me!” The Sword Spirit replied coldly.

Xu Que was speechless. It was quite difficult to find a sword three yards long at the level of a Celestial Artifact! Maybe a Celestial Artifact like that hadn’t been forged by anyone yet!

“Humph! This is so annoying! It seems I should learn the skill of equipment forging!” Xu Que said bitterly.

Boom!

At this time, the man who used the long halberd had escaped from Xu Que’s ring of encirclement when Xu Que was pushed back by his halberd!

“Hah, hah, Xu Que, it’s over! When the Ivy Academy sends reinforcement here, you will die!” The man said with a cold smile. He believed Xu Que didn’t dare to chase him for the rest of his teammates would escape.

“Heh, heh, you can never intimidate me! No matter how many people your academy sends here, I’ll kill them all!” Xu Que said with a cold smile. However, his heart was unwilling to fight all those people!

If he had been powerful enough, he could have killed all those people by giving a full play of the Firestorm Wheels.

“Humph! How arrogant you are! If you are not a coward, just kill me! It is a pity that you are alone here and can’t kill all of us at the same time! So, just save your tough words!” After running for a bit, the man with the long halberd stopped. He said as he looked at Xu Que with a sarcastic smile, “I will be right here waiting for you! If you are not a coward, just come here and kill me!”

At such a distance, he was confident he could run away before Xu Que dashed toward him. In this way, he could ensure his safety and also rescue his teammates!

However, his words dawned on Xu Que immediately!

I am alone here?

No, I can use my replica!

“Ha, ha, ha, little dumbass, thank you for reminding me! I almost forget I am not alone here!” Xu Que laughed wildly.

The next moment, he summoned the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders directly.

Boom!

A large cloud of Spiritual Qi in the sky gathered. Then magnificent lightning gushed out from Xu Que’s body and started to intertwine with the Spiritual Qi. Then a replica which looked exactly like Xu Que appeared!

“Wh…at?” The young men and women from the Ivy Academy were dumbfounded.

The magic arts of summoning a replica were quite common in the World of Near Celestial! However, Xu Que’s replica also waved the broken sword as it stepped on the Firestorm Wheels, which didn’t make sense! This was a replica with identical Celestial Artifacts! How could they win this combat?

Whoosh!

Instantly, the Thunder Illusion Body started to fly around the rest of the people of the Ivy Academy along Xu Que’s ring of encirclement. At this time, Xu Que’s real body had already disappeared!

“Oh, no!” The man with the long halberd sensed danger! He was stunned by Xu Que’s replica and forgot to escape immediately. Now he had missed the best time to escape!

“Heh, heh, here I am! Why are you running away?” Xu Que’s voice rang out in the ears of the man with the long halberd!

“Wait!” The man with the long halberd turned pale immediately. He waved the long halberd as he patted his chest. Then he spat out a strand of blood mist, which meant he had tried to escape with the Blood Escape Art!

Now, he was almost as fast as Xu Que’s Firestorm Wheels!

Clang!

When the man started to run, his long halberd stopped the broken sword from slashing into his body, which created many sparkles behind him. However, the broken sword managed to stab into the man’s body at last. The man was quite excited because the sword only went into his body a tiny bit and didn’t wound his vital organs!

“Hah, hah, hah, Xu Que, you failed! Your sword is too short!” The man with the long halberd laughed. Then he spat blood mist and tried to escape with the Blood Escape Art again! Although he would lose a lot of cultivation achievements and life span in this way, he knew they were nothing in front of death!

Swash! Soon, along with a crisp sound, the smile was frozen on the man’s face! The broken sword, which had been stabbed into his back, pierced his body completely.

Almost at the same time, Xu Que’s cold smile came again! “Heh, heh, although I am short, I can rotate! Now, die!”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1108 - Come On! Let’S Fight!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1108 - Come On! Let’S Fight!

Chapter 1108: Come On! Let’s Fight!

At this moment, the Sword Pavilion had been totally ruined!

A large area of which the diameter was over 50 km was turned into a sea of fire! The sky was full of flames. The ground was covered by surging lava. All moisture in the air was vaporized in the flames.

When Lan Xinyue arrived at this place, she wrapped her body with the Celestial Core Power and didn’t dare to come any closer. Now, she was standing in the sky and looking around in terror!

Most cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage of the Sword Pavilion had been incinerated.

In a corner, Zhang Yun’er, who was badly mutilated, was buried by soils and lava. Her blood was being evaporated. Only half of her head could be seen on the ground. Now, she was at her last gasp.

Not far away from her, Liu Hualong was also lying on the ground. Both of his arms had disappeared. A giant wound could be seen on his back. His white bones were exposed, which was so startling.

“My fellow cultivator!”

Lan Xinyue didn’t have time to kill Liu Hualong by taking this opportunity. She ran to a heap of rubble by tracking Xu Que’s aura.

Xu Qu, who was lying on the ground, was not much better than Liu Hualong. All his skins and muscles were ruined. Many ribs were broken and reached out of his body. His entire body was a heap of minced meat.

When Xu Que saw Lan Xinyue who was running to him, he was too weak to say something. What he could do was only to heal his wounds through the System’s Automatic Recovery Function!

In fact, he tried to escape by using the Divine Escape Spell when he threw out the 6-color Fiery Lotus.

It was a pity that the spell failed. The power of the 6-color Fiery Lotus went beyond his imagination. He had ignited the Divine Escape Spell when the 6-color Fiery Lotus exploded. The next moment, he was knocked out of the Void channel created by the escape spell. So, he felt terrible now.

Luckily, his physique was tough enough. Also, he managed to hide in the Void for a while when the 6-color Fiery Lotus exploded. If he was impacted by the explosion directly, he might have been more miserable and even killed now!

My God! I will never use it casually in future!

Xu Que sighed in his mind bitterly.

The Buddha’s Fiery Lotus he used now was much more powerful than before. Besides the power of the Mystical Fires, his True Core Strength and Taoist Connotation enhanced the power of the Fiery Lotus remarkably. Also, the power of the Fiery Lotus was also enhanced by the People Killing Book of All Layers!

Therefore, the destructive power of the 6-color Fiery Lotus was extremely horrible!

However, such a powerful Fiery Lotus still failed to kill but just seriously wounded Liu Hualong, a powerhouse at the Initial Stage of the Earth Celestial Realm who was so close to the explosion.

Zhang Yun’er, who was at the summit of the Human Celestial Stage, also survived because she was a little bit further away from the Fiery Lotus.

Xu Que was not satisfied with the result. His plan was to make a feint that he perished together with Liu Hualong when he escaped with the Divine Escape Spell. He didn’t expect he failed to kill Liu Hualong and he was also seriously wounded by the explosion.

“My fellow cultivator, are…you OK? This is the First-grade Vital Dew Pill. Just eat it for it might help you to heal your wounds!” Lan Xinyue took out a pill with intense medicine fragrance at this time and placed it before Xu Que’s lips.

Xu Que was too weak to open his mouth. He had to lie on the ground and continue to heal his wounds with the System.

The System’s recovery function could always heal minor wounds quickly. However, the efficiency of System in healing serious wounds was too low.

Xu Que hadn’t been seriously wounded for a long time. Last time, he was seriously wounded when he tried to protect Jiang Hongyan from her Heavenly Tribulation.

Whoosh!

Several air-rending sounds came in at this time.

Some cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage rushed up with kill intent. Then, they fixed their eyes on the pill in Lan Xinyue’s hand and said in surprise, “The First-grade Vital Dew Pill?”

“What are you going to do?” Lan Xinyue inserted the pill into Xu Que’s mouth. Then, she stood up and started at those people vigilantly.

Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage frowned for they had been annoyed.

“Damn! Do you know you have wasted a First-grade celestial pill?”

“He will die sooner or later. Why do you want to waste that pill?”

“Anyway, it seems you have a lot of precious items. I didn’t expect you even have the first-grade pills!”

They said as they stared at Lan Xinyue coldly.

At the same time, the pill melted in Xu Que’s mouth and was turned to magnificent vital energy to nourish all his Meridians.

Thanks to the dual action of the System’s recovery function and the pill, the rate of Xu Que’s recovery was doubled instantly. His Meridians were healed rapidly and his broken bones were also replaced by new bones!

“Humph!”

Xu Que regained some strength and was able to speak. Then, he snorted immediately.

Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage, who were about to kill Lan Xinyue, were surprised by Xu Que’s snort and stopped their action.

“What happened?”

“This guy is not dead!”

They gazed at each other but didn’t dare to attack recklessly.

After all, they had witnessed Xu Que’s horrible strength just now. Now, they didn’t know what Xu Que was preparing for them.

At this time, Xu Que was still lying on the ground and his body was covered by blood. Only his mouth was moving. But his voice was quite sonorous, “How dare you seek death here?”

“Heh-heh, I really admire your courage!”

“If you are not a coward, come here!”

“Come on! Let’s fight!”

Xu Que, who was quite excited, shouted sonorously.

Lan Xinyue was dumbfounded directly and she really worried those people could really rush to them.

She was totally embarrassed by Xu Que’s words! How could you clamor in this way when you are seriously wounded and can only move your lips?

However, those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage frowned and were held back temporarily.

Lan Xinyue was surprised by this scene. When she remembered Xu Que’s horrible strength, those cultivators’ hesitation was understandable for her.

If she were in their position, she wouldn’t dare to attack Xu Que either for she didn’t know Xu Que at all.

“What? What are you waiting for?”

“Come here!”

“Damn! You are really a bunch of sissies!”

“I can’t understand how you survive in this world in such a cowardly way?”

“Come here and let’s fight! I will fight you with only 1 hand, OK?”

Xu Que was still clamoring heartily.

Those powerhouses at the Human Celestial Stage were annoyed at last. They clenched their fists and were anxious to tramp down Xu Que’s mouth.

“Humph! Stop your nonsense! You are at a disadvantage now. How dare you clamor in this way?” One of them shouted angrily.

“You know nothing! You are not qualified to be attacked by me! If you are not cowards, just come here! I will jump up and smash your f*cking knees directly!” Xu Que shouted arrogantly.

“Damn!” Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage couldn’t help but grind their teeth angrily.

However, the more arrogant Xu Que’s clamor was, the more flustered they would be!

“Come on!”

“Come here!”

“I won’t use my hands during the fight, OK?”

“And I won’t use my legs and my dick in the fight either, OK?”

“Humph! You are just a bunch of scraps! If you don’t want to have a fight with me, I’ll fall asleep!”

“You are too cowardly! How could you have the nerve…Hey! Hey! What are you doing? What are you going to do? Stay away from me! Holy shit! I’m kidding with you just now!”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 1109 - I’Ll Never Die!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1109 - I’Ll Never Die!

Chapter 1109: I’ll Never Die!

Xu Que was dumbfounded for he didn’t expect he really annoyed those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage. Now, they were rushing towards him rapidly.

They are too f*cking headstrong!

Whoosh!

Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage rushed up and started to throw out all kinds of magnificent and powerful magic arts angrily.

One of them turned his Celestial Core Power into a giant beast with a head of lion and the body of leopard, which was dashing towards Xu Que and Lan Xinyue.

Another person summoned a long river in the Void with his sword. Now, the river was gushing towards Xu Que and Lan Xinyue with horrible momentum.

Although these magic arts were quite magnificent, all of them were ranged attacks. Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage were angry. But they hadn’t lost their mind. They decided to stay away from Xu Que.

However, these magic arts already made Xu Que despair.

Now, he was not able to move a bit. He could only use his mouth to bluff. If he was hit by those magic arts, he would be killed.

Ding! “The Host’s life is in danger. Is the Host going to activate the Urgent Mechanism? Attention! This mechanism could only be activated once in the Host’s life!” Suddenly, the System’s warning tone came in.

The Urgent Mechanism?

What the hell is that?

Xu Que was stunned and couldn’t help but smile wryly. This time, he really screwed up for this was the first time for the System to provide him with this warning message, which was just like the critical ill notice issued by a doctor!

Boom!

When Xu Que was considering whether to use that one-off Urgent Mechanism, a big bang came in from beside him.

Magnificent Celestial Core Power gushed out from Lan Xinyue’s body. She waved her hand to throw out a strand of light from her sleeves. Then, the light was turned to a scroll painting in the sky.

Swish!

The scroll painting was opened instantly. Mountains and rivers could be seen in the painting. The majestic mountains were creeping in the painting like a giant sleeping dragon which was about to wake up. The rivers at the foot of the mountains were surging and became a magnificent sea at last.

Powerful traction force gushed out from the scroll painting and formed a whirlpool which started to suck the Spiritual Qi in this area crazily.

“A Second-grade Scroll Painting? You…you are a painter!” Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage changed their expression and shouted in surprise.

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

The next moment, all their magic arts were sucked into the painting together with the Spiritual Qi, which created a lot of deafening sound of explosions.

In the painting, the giant beast and other magnificent magic arts smashed into the mountains and sea. Then, all mountains collapsed and the sea was evaporated by the horrible destructive power.

Now, the graceful and elegant landscape painting was turned to a terrible doodle. Then, the scroll painting fell to the ground!

At the same time, Lan Xinyue also turned pale and stepped back. Blood could be seen on her lips. It seemed she was also wounded.

“Hah-hah-hah, I didn’t expect I can meet a painter here!”

“What a pity! Even you have a Second-grade Scroll Painting, you are just at the Initial Stage of the Human Celestial Stage after all!”

“You used the Second-grade Scroll Painting to block our attacks forcibly, which would definitely wound you! Now, what could you do?”

Those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage sneered as they walked towards Xu Que and Lan Xinyue.

Just now they only used the ranged attacks because they tried to check Xu Que’s reaction.

Now, Xu Que was still lying on the ground sickly. He even needed Lan Xinyue to protect him. So, those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage suspected Xu Que was just bluffing.

“Hah-hah! Finally, we found him! He is here!”

A loud laughter came in at this time.

Then, dozens of figures rushed in from different direction as they shouted loudly.

“Irrelevant personnel shall leave here immediately. This place has been taken over by the Majesty Alliance!”

“Bullshit! This place belongs to the Generosity Sect!”

“Mind your words! Are you going to oppose the Heaven Alliance?”

“According to the command of the leader of the Heaven Alliance, this place is under the management of the Heaven Alliance temporarily. The partition of this place will be performed several days later!”

“Nonsense! We don’t want this place! We just want that guy!”

People of different sects had arrived at this place one after another.

Undoubtedly, they didn’t want to get this place. Their target was Xu Que’s precious items. So, they tried to take this opportunity to rob Xu Que’s treasures after killing him.

“Oh, no!”

Seeing that, those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage changed their expression. They were also from a sect. If other big sects had a hand in this issue, they would be kicked out directly.

“We have no time! Let’s kill him quickly and leave here!”

“Bitch, if you are clever, just don’t stand in our way!”

“Don’t waste any time! Just kill both of them!”

They were in such a hurry that they forgot Xu Que’s threat and threw out many magic arts again.

Lan Xinyue turned pale. She turned around and tried to run away by dragging Xu Que.

“Ms. Lan, just run way, and leave me to them!” Xu Que shouted immediately.

“No!” Lan Xinyue shook her head and said sturdily, “I’ll never leave you here to wait for your death!”

Even she had stayed in this abandoned place for several years, her character was not changed. So, she would never escape alone by leaving Xu Que here.

But Xu Que shouted loudly to interrupt her, “No, you just leave here! I will use my unique skill which could wound you accidentally!”

“Your unique skill? It can wound me accidentally?” Lan Xinyue, who was totally confused by Xu Que’s words, looked at Xu Que who was covered in blood in disbelief.

What the hell?

You’ve been seriously wounded! How could you use a unique skill which could wound me accidentally?

The next moment, her beautiful eyes were filled with shock.

Xu Que’s broken bones which could be seen on his body had disappeared. Those horrible wounds were being healed at a speed which was visible to the naked eyes!

“How…could this be?” Lan Xinyue was totally surprised. Even the pill she gave to him was a First-grade pill, it wouldn’t be so effective!

Xu Que’s current wounds couldn’t even be healed by 10 Vital Dew Pills! How could he realize this in such a short time?

Boom!

At the same time, the magic arts of those cultivators at the Human Celestial Stage had also arrived, which caused deafening sound in the Void.

“Die!” They shouted viciously.

For them, Xu Que, who was at his last gasp, wouldn’t able to cause any trouble. As long as they could kill Xu Que, they could obtain those Vital Rice and the powerful Celestial Artifacts!

“I will never die! I can still be saved by emergency treatments!”

Suddenly, Xu Que shouted as he sat up on the ground.

The next moment, he waved his hand to take out a wheelchair. Meanwhile, his Firestorm Wheels landed on both sides of the wheelchair.

Whoosh! Xu Que jumped onto the wheelchair. Then, he placed Lan Xinyue who was still in a daze on his laps. After that, he jumped up into the sky and waved his hand as he shouted loudly, “Sword!”

Whoosh!

Along with an ear-piercing sound, a broken sword appeared in Xu Que’s hand. The entire area was filled with the horrible kill intent!

…

chapters.body:
Chapter 1135 - Obstruction And Interception

Chapter 1135: Obstruction and Interception

Lan Hetu, Lan Xinyue, and the others were totally shocked. They walked through the Vital Ants and left the encirclement safely, following Xu Que. Their minds were totally blank because they couldn’t believe what they were experiencing. Xu Que had managed to intimidate more than 10,000 Vital Ants and three Queen Ants all by himself! They were shocked by the man who was walking in front of them. He was so powerful—his strength was unfathomable!

…..

The three Queen Ants were quite helpless. They had reached the Initial Stage of the Earth Celestial Stage, so they were not intimidated by Xu Que. Their king had asked them to do their best to capture Xu Que. But the problem was that all of them were intimidated when the Taiyi Heaven Book appeared. They had been totally subdued by that book. The loyalty that had been present for so many years in their bloodline was not to Xuanyuan Wanrong, but to the Taiyi Heaven Book!

Only the Taiyi Heaven Book could change the tribe’s bloodline. Therefore, when Xu Que used the Taiyi Heaven Book, his words became orders, which were almost as authoritative as the orders of Xuanyuan Wanrong! Thus, the three Queen Ants didn’t dare to move a muscle. Their will was not able to conquer the reverence in their bodies and bloodlines. So they could only let Xu Que go!

…..

During the next several days, Xu Que and his teammates encountered obstruction and interception many times. Most of these were just like the previous ones. A lot of Vital Ants were on patrol. Dozens of human cultivators tried to follow the Vital Ants secretly.

They knew they couldn’t rival Xu Que. Therefore, they decided to stay close to the Vital Ants so that they could send signals to inform Li Tianxun when Xu Que had been stopped by the Vital Ants. In this way, they could earn a lot of rewards.

It was a pity that Xu Que knew their tactics. So he would kill all human cultivators whenever he saw them to stop them from sending signals to call for reinforcements. And it was even easier to deal with the Vital Ants for he could just walk away after showing them the Taiyi Heaven Book!

However, the disadvantage of doing this was that Qian Guowan would hear about this sooner or later. Xu Que knew the Vital Ants and the Queen Ants were afraid of the Taiyi Heaven Book. But he was not sure whether Qian Guowan would also be influenced by it. After all, the strength gap between them was too large. Most of the time, strength was more of the deciding factor than the rules. So Xu Que used the Firestorm Wheels to increase his speed. When he sensed the aura of human cultivators, he would put away the Firestorm Wheels and slaughter them quietly

Finally, Xu Que and his teammates had arrived near the mountain where the Void Interface Spell was set up. He ran into Qian Yi’er, who was the cute Queen Ant and the daughter of Qian Guowan, at that place. She had come to that place alone, and she was surprised by Xu Que’s appearance. “Bad guy! What brings you here?”

“What’s wrong? Are you also going to capture me?” Xu Que said with a smile, for she was not a threat.

“Nonsense! I hope you will let me go!” Qian Yi’er rolled her eyes and said with embarrassment, “Do you realize you’re going in the wrong direction? My father and a lot of Vital Ants are just ahead of us. If you walk along this way, you will definitely run into them!”

“Oh? Then, what are you doing here? Did you come to tip me off?” Xu Que was amused by her words.

He knew Qian Guowan would try to stop him from reaching his destination. After all, they had encountered so many Queen Ants these last few days. They would definitely tell Qian Guowan what had happened. According to Xu Que’s travel, Qian Guowan could figure out where he was going easily.

Puff! “I am here to find my second sister! She said she had found a new mountain for me. So I will go back to the old nest to take some belongings. I didn’t expect to meet you here! What bad luck!” Qian Yi’er said, pouting with her little mouth.

“OK, OK, you can go now. Please don’t stand in my way!” Xu Que said with a smile as he let Qian Yi’er go.

Qian Yi’er was shocked by his reaction and said in disbelief, “Are you really going to go this way? I’m not lying to you. My father and his troops are over there!”

“It’s OK! They are coming toward us now!” Xu Que said as he looked at the sky behind Qian Yi’er.

This place had been tightly surrounded by numerous Queen Ants and Vital Ants led by Qian Guowan. It seemed they had made up their mind to take Xu Que. They had created a lot of noise, which startled the human cultivators. When Xu Que saw Qian Guowan and the Vital Ants, he also sensed the aura of Li Tianxun and many other cultivators not far away. Maybe they were also rushing toward this place at this moment.

“Heh! It seems the last combat is inevitable!” Xu Que shook his head with a smile. If it weren’t really necessary, he didn’t want to get involved in tough combat. Although he could always gain experience, the risks were still too high. He didn’t like to push the limits. A man who walks on a wire must be very experienced—a small mistake might result in death!

That was not the way Xu Que wanted to live. What he wanted was to become stronger and crush his enemies easily. However, the current situation had nothing to do with easy combat! This combat was going to be tougher than the one with Liu Hualong. He guessed that even a Six-color Fiery Lotus was not going to be able to win this combat for him.

“Xu Que, come back with me! Although you have the Taiyi Heaven Book, we only obey the orders of our Master!” Qian Guowan shouted as he looked at Xu Que. At this time, he was no longer as angry as before. After all, two months had passed, and he had calmed down from his fury. He had figured out that the Master didn’t want to kill Xu Que and had forgiven the mistakes made by the Vital Ants. The only reason was that Xu Que’s identity was really extraordinary. He was not a fraud but the real One Chosen by Heaven! It was highly possible that Xuanyuan Wanrong was annoyed by a misunderstanding between Xu Que and her. Therefore, Xu Que could still be deemed a master of the Vital Ants theoretically.

“Guowan, you’d better go back now! I don’t want to kill all of you. But if you really force me to do that, I don’t mind killing all of you! Believe me, I can do that!” Xu Que said with a calm smile.

His words stunned Qian Guowan a bit. He wouldn’t have been scared if Xu Que had shouted at him. However, Xu Que’s calm reaction, which contradicted the powerful Terrifying Spiritual Qi gushing out from his body, really got on Qian Guowan’s nerves. Qian Guowan became speechless. His intuition told him that Xu Que was really able to kill all of them. Although this idea was quite absurd, he still chose to believe it. The reason was quite simple! Because Xu Que had placed a knife in front of the throat of Qian Yi’er at this moment.

“Damn! Let my daughter go!” Qian Guowan yelled angrily.

Qian Yi’er was his dearest daughter, who was more important than anything. If Xu Que threatened the entire Vital Ants tribe with Qian Yi’er, Qian Guowan really didn’t know what to do.

“I can let her go, but you should trade her with Li Tianxun’s head!” Xu Que said with a smile as he looked somewhere else. He could sense the aura of Li Tianxun. He was sure Qian Guowan could also sense it. He tried to tell Qian Guowan that he would never let Qian Yi’er go if Li Tianxun was not killed.

“OK! I’ll kill him now. Just don’t hurt her!” Without any hesitation, Qian Guowan dashed toward Li Tianxun.

Xu Que had the Taiyi Heaven Book and also Qian Yi’er as a hostage, which left Qian Guowan no choice. So he decided to kill Li Tianxun immediately before Li Tianxun had time to escape.

Boom!

Qian Guowan jumped up into the sky, which created a deafening explosion in the Void.

Li Tianxun also rushed out from the mountain where he was hiding. Then he escaped, leaving the human cultivators behind. He was never going to be able to defeat Qian Guowan. And, this time, Qian Guowan was determined to kill him, which made Li Tianxun choke with anger. This was caused by Xu Que’s words! The more Li Tianxun thought about it, the madder he got. So he shouted angrily as he was running away, “Xu Que, I’ll kill you!”

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1136 - The Time Is Now!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1136 - The Time Is Now!

Chapter 1136: The Time Is Now!

“What? I am here now, just come and kill me!” Xu Que said with a wicked smile.

Li Tianxun had no time to reply to him. Qian Guowan had caught up with Li Tianxun and started to attack mercilessly. Li Tianxun tried to escape because he didn’t want to have a head-on collision with Qian Guowan. But unfortunately he was caught and now he had to protect himself.

A world-shaking combat between two powerhouses at the Medium Stage of the Earth Celestial Stage started. The sky was filled with their splendid magic arts.

“Bad guy! Why…did you kidnap me?” Qian Yi’er, who was grabbed by Xu Que, shouted angrily at this time. She had just figured out that she had been kidnapped by Xu Que and used to threaten her father! She was quite angry.

“Don’t worry! I wouldn’t kill an innocent girl like you! I was just trying to scare your father!” Xu Que replied with a faint smile. He hadn’t planned to use Qian Yi’er as a bargaining chip to scare Qian Guowan. He didn’t expect that Qian Guowan would give in so easily! But it had certainly simplified the situation.

Qian Guowan was fighting Li Tianxun. Now, nobody could stop him in this area!

Puff! “You’ve scared him successfully! Why don’t you let me go? Hey! Stay away from me! Why are you poking me with something? Stop it!” Qian Yi’er said in disgust as she pushed Xu Que’s arm with her little hands. She wasn’t worried about her identity as a hostage at all.

However, her words shocked Lan Hetu and the others.

“Brother Que, this is not a good time for that. Let’s just leave here!” Lan Hetu suggested with embarrassment.

“Damn! What are you thinking? She was leaning on my rod! Why are you looking at me this way? Hey, wait! This is a misunderstanding! What I said is not my d*ck, but this rod!” Xu Que said angrily.

In these days, he placed the black rod on his belt so that he could use it to hit his enemies during combat easily. In this way, his movements wouldn’t cause any fluctuation of Spiritual Qi to startle his enemies. He didn’t expect it would cause a misunderstanding.

“That’s enough! I’m sure this is indeed the opportunity for us to leave here!” Lan Xinyue stepped out and ended the farce.

“Great! Little cutie, you should go with me and you will have a delicious lollipop to suck!” Xu Que tried to coax Qian Yi’er so that she would go with them cooperatively. He didn’t expect that Qian Yi’er would refuse him this time. But, she even bit Xu Que’s arm and shouted, “No, I don’t want to do that! My father told me to bite anyone who gives me something to suck to death!”

Gasp!

Xu Que felt chilliness in his crotch. This Qian Guowan is too vicious! How could you ask your daughter to do that? How despicable you are!

Xu Que pulled his arm out of the mouth of Qian Yi’er. Meanwhile, he purchased a lollipop from the System store and said, “Stop! Look! I really have something delicious!”

“What?” Qian Yi’er was attracted immediately. She said, licking her lips, “What is this?”

“This is a lollipop! I remember all ants like sweet foods! Just taste it and go with me!” Xu Que gave the lollipop to Qian Yi’er.

Qian Yi’er put the lollipop into her mouth. Then she said with a delighted smile, “Wow! It is really delicious!”

“Delicious, right? Actually, I’ve placed a lot of delicious foods in your old nest. Will you go there?”

“OK! OK!” In this way, this little girl was coaxed by Xu Que again. She was walking after Xu Que cooperatively. She was even more eager than Xu Que to reach the destination.

Lan Hetu, Lan Xinyue, and the others were totally shocked, and they smiled wryly with embarrassment. This was the first time they had met such an innocent, cute Queen Ant. It was really unlucky for her to meet a rascal like Xu Que. However, nothing happened on their way after that. The Vital Ants didn’t dare to attack Xu Que and made way for them.

Li Tianxun, who was fighting Qian Guowan, kept an eye on Xu Que’s direction. When he saw that Xu Que didn’t run away but chose to walk toward the mountain, he relaxed.

…..

Soon, Xu Que arrived at the mountain. Then he yelled at the Vital Ants to stop following him. Qian Yi’er, who had eaten up the lollipop, was looking around anxiously. She was trying to find the delicious food mentioned by Xu Que.

“The delicious food you are looking for is here. This is all for you, and you can go back to your father now!” Xu Que was amused by her reaction. He had purchased a lot of candies and snacks from the System store and gave all of them to her.

“Wow!” Qian Yi’er’s eyes lit up and she shouted delightedly, “Bad guy, you are so kind! From now on, I won’t call you bad guy anymore for you are a good guy!”

“Nonsense! Just go home! Remember, just stay at home when you don’t have urgent issues to handle, for you can’t always meet a good guy like me in the outside world!” After saying that, Xu Que waved his hand to send Qian Yi’er to the foot of the mountain with magnificent True Core Strength.

Everyone believed Xu Que was a bad guy for almost everything he did was bad. But some of the things he did would always surprise people. When he said “…you can’t always meet a good guy like me in the outside world”, Lan Xinyue was surprised. It was quite funny to hear those words from a bad guy like him.

On second thought, if an innocent like Qian Yi’er met other people, she would never have been treated in such a good way. Even Lan Xinyue couldn’t guarantee that she would treat Qian Yi’er in this way. Maybe only Xu Que could be so nice to Qian Yi’er.

“Ms. Lan, it’s your show now. I haven’t been to the Xuanhuang Continent before. So you need to activate the Space-Breaking Spell. Don’t worry, I will help you when you run out of your True Core Strength!” Xu Que took out the Space-Breaking Spell and placed it in front of Lan Xinyue.

“You…want me to do that?” Lan Xinyue came to herself and was shocked by Xu Que’s request. She had never used a high-end spell like the Space-Breaking Spell. She was totally surprised.

“Exactly! You will activate it! Don’t worry. Just focus your mind when you think of the Xuanhuang Continent. I will handle all the rest of the issues!” Xu Que said, nodding his head. Then he placed the Space-Breaking Spell into Lan Xinyue’s hands. Even Xu Que was not able to activate the Space-Breaking Spell, let alone Lan Xinyue. The True Core Strength and Taoist Connotation for activating this spell were quite complicated. So Xu Que would have to ask the System to do it as before. Therefore, Lan Xinyue’s mind was the only thing they needed to leave for the Xuanhuang Continent.

“Prepare yourself. The spell will be activated soon!” Xu Que patted Lan Xinyue’s shoulder and said with a smile. Then his Soul Strength gushed out.

The next moment, his Little Gold Clone which was hiding in a corner activated the Void Interface Spell. Then it went back to Xu Que like a strand of golden light.

Rumble!

After that, a deafening big bang came from the mountain. A black whirlpool was created at the place where the Void Interface Spell was set up. The whirlpool, which was becoming larger and larger, caused many strong air currents.

“The time is now! Come on!” Xu Que shouted at Lan Xinyue immediately.

Lan Xinyue closed her eyes and focused her mind to think about everything she could remember in the Xuanhuang Continent. The Space-Breaking Spell in her hands started to melt slowly. Dazzling light, which was coming out of the spell, started to enwrap all of them!

Chapter 1141 - I’M Actually Very Strong

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

At the moment, the tall woman felt a little sorry! No matter what kind of person Xu Que was, it all boiled down to one thing; Xu Que was knocked unconscious because of her!

Thus, even if Xu Que was nonetheless shameless, she was embarrassed to ask any more questions. She immediately replied, “Since fellow cultivator has forgotten, I’ll explain it to you! We’re now in the Earth Continent that belongs to the World of Near Celestials, but the Earth Continent is only a general term for our realm. In fact, the Earth Continent is also divided into several Celestial Realms…”

She could almost be sure that Xu Que came from the Xuanhuang Continent, which wasn’t an uncommon scenario. Hence, when she introduced the situation of the Earth Continent, she basically explained everything in detail. And Xiao Ru added some explanations to supplement too.

With their explanations, Xu Que quickly absorbed all the new information and finally got a preliminary understanding of the Earth Continent. Generally speaking, the Earth Continent was quite different from the Xuanhuang Continent.

Although there were many academies and sects in the Earth Continent and the academies attached great importance to the cultivation of disciples, similar to the Xuanhuang Continent, in terms of geographical divisions, the Earth Continent was much more complex than the Xuanhuang Continent.

It might be because the continent was too vast, so it was divided into six big Celestial Realms, which were managed by the six big Golden Celestials of the Earth Continent! Every Celestial Realm was very vast in area. The one Xu Que was located in belonged to the Zhen Yuan Celestial Realm. The Zhen Yuan Daoist was in charge of that Celestial Realm. His cultivation had already reached the peak of a Golden Celestial and his strength was unusually formidable.

The tall woman and Xiao Ru were also in that Celestial Realm and they seemed to have powerful backing. According to Xiao Ru, the tall woman was the Second Miss from the Wind Chamber of Commerce. The president’s precious daughter, her name was Feng Lanwu.

And the Wind Chamber of Commerce also had a long history in the Zhen Yuan Celestial Realm; it was tens of thousands of years old and a famous brand. Even the leader of the Zhen Yuan Celestial Realm, Zhen Yuan Daoist, had personally visited the Wind Chamber of Commerce!

Xu Que felt that the Wind Chamber of Commerce wasn’t that simple. But he remembered the conversation between the tall woman and Xiao Ru and he suddenly smiled and asked, “Since your Wind Chamber of Commerce is so strong, why do you need to run out personally to find an Equipment Forging Grandmaster?”

“Because…” Xiao Ru was tongue-tied.

The tall woman named Feng Lanwu had a trace of defeat flash in her eyes as she shook her head slightly. “Fellow cultivator, that’s embarrassing. Xiao Ru only mentioned the past glory of the Wind Chamber of Commerce. Now it’s no longer famous and has fallen to a small local chamber of commerce.”

“I get it, Miss Feng, you don’t need to be so depressed. After all, time is cruel. If you look back at how many major forces have disappeared throughout history, Wind Chamber of Commerce, after so many years, is still towering like a giant today; it’s already a magnificent task!” Xu Que smiled.

Xiao Ru burst out with a chuckle, “I thought you were a fool just now, and I didn’t know you could talk like that; turning bad things into good things!”

Feng Lanwu smiled, looked at Xu Que and said, “Thank you so much for your kind words, but fellow cultivator you have exaggerated your praises!”

“You’re welcome! You’re welcome!” Xu Que immediately waved his hand and said modestly, “I’m just telling the truth. An old and famous Chamber of Commerce like your Wind Chamber of Commerce must have gone through numerous crises, numerous adversities, and emerged stronger after each crisis. This is a test! Of course, unlike our Exploding Heavens Faction, it’s only 1 million years old. Since its establishment, it hasn’t encountered any difficulties. We’ve enjoyed all the glory along the way and have been strong all the time!”

“Ah?” Xiao Ru and Feng Lanwu’s smiles stuck on their faces and the corners of their lips twitched slightly. After all that lengthy speech, that fellow wasn’t saying anything courteous; he was merely waiting for the time to praise his own faction! But what was that Exploding Heavens Faction? They had never heard of it before and it already had a history of 1 million years?

Suddenly, both their faces had looks of extreme doubt; they affirmed that Xu Que must be exaggerating.

Even in the Zhen Yuan Celestial Realm, some powerful and ancient forces had only a history of more than 100,000 years. That dude mentioned an uncommon faction’s name and claimed it to have a history of 1 million years. It seemed that he was boasting and fooling them!

“Uh, don’t look at me like that. I’m telling you the truth. There’s no need to lie to you. Every one of us in the Exploding Heavens Faction is an elite and a proud son of heaven!” Xu Que said as he slapped his chest.

“Psshh!”

Xiao Ru burst out laughing, “Elite and a proud son of heaven? Does that include you?

“You’re right!” Xu Que smiled and said, “I know what you’re laughing about, but it doesn’t matter. Believe it or not, it was merely a blunder just now. I’m actually very strong. If I’m serious, I can beat both of you in one move!”

But in fact, Xu Que himself wondered why he was struck unconscious with a single move!

When the Magic Art of Feng Lanwu was about to hit him, he didn’t feel any danger. Even the power of the Magic Art was similar to those cultivators in the Human Celestial Stage in the Lost Land; it was very ordinary. But when the Magic Art fell onto his Dark Heavenly Sword, he was struck unconscious!

So it wasn’t that Feng Lanwu was too strong, but that Xu Que seemed to have some problems after he was injured; he was weaker now! He had just regained consciousness and hadn’t had the time to find out why.

But for Feng Lanwu and Xiao Ru, Xu Que was really weak. Whether or not he was knocked unconscious from a single blow, he was still a cultivator in the Initial Stage of the Half-Celestial Stage. He was a little inferior as compared to Xiao Ru who was in the Medium Stage of the Half Celestial Stage. Naturally, it was impossible to believe his words.

Someone in the Initial Stage of the Half-Celestial Stage could defeat a person in the Medium Stage of the Half-Celestial Stage and a person in the Medium Stage of the Human Celestial Stage at the same time? If that wasn’t bragging, then what was?

“Fellow cultivator, not far ahead is Li Qiu City. We’re entering the city and taking the Teleportation Spell to go home; we’d better let you off the Flying Boat here. We’ll leave our next encounter to fate!” Just then, Feng Lanwu said.

Her Soul Strength had always been in control of the Flying Boat, as she was about to reach Li Qiu City, she had to let Xu Que go first.

Although the Wind Chamber of Commerce was in a decline, she was talented in cultivation, beautiful in her looks, and had a reputation among the younger generation of cultivators. If someone saw a man in her flying boat, there would inevitably be gossip. And if that happened, Xu Que would surely be under the watch by those lurking in the dark too.

Hence, whether it was for her innocence or for Xu Que’s safety, she felt that she should keep a safe distance away from Xu Que; it could save them from a lot of trouble!

But Xu Que was unhappy to hear that.

If he hadn’t been injured, he would have left straightaway, but now he realized that his body might have problems. Moreover, he had just reached the Earth Continent and he wasn’t familiar with the place. In case of any trouble, he was afraid that he couldn’t even win over someone in the Half-Celestial Stage! If that happened, it wasn’t as simple as being bullied; he might die at any moment!

Hence, before finding out the reasons for his weakness and restoring his strength to its peak, he felt that he shouldn’t be left alone. Moreover, Feng Lanwu’s Wind Chamber of Commerce seemed to have some status and strength in the area. If he could be shielded under them temporarily, it would be the most appropriate and safe choice.

However…which excuse should he use to stay?

“Wait a minute!”

Suddenly, Xu Que seemed to have an idea. The corner of his lips raised and he looked at Feng Lanwu with a smile and said, “Miss Feng, I heard you mentioned before, you’re looking for an Equipment Forging Grandmaster?”

“Yes, we’re not going to hide from you. It concerned the life and death of me and the future of the Wind Chamber of Commerce. It’s a pity that we’ve searched countless places in recent years, and we’re still empty-handed!” Speaking of that, Feng Lanwu couldn’t help but looked defeated and slightly disappointed.

“Oh, Miss Feng, you’re in luck today. I’ve good news for you!” Xu Que straightened his chest immediately, and his smile was akin to a man of great sanctity.

Subsequently, in the confused expressions of Feng Lanwu and Xiao Ru, he confidently said, “In fact, I happen to be an Equipment Forging Grandmaster!”
