chapters.title: Chapter 1161 - Why Did You Save Me? Why Did You Wake Me Up?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1161 - Why Did You Save Me? Why Did You Wake Me Up?

Chapter 1161: Why Did You Save Me? Why Did You Wake Me Up?

One hour later…

Clink!

With a crisp sound, Xu Que broke the last bottle of Maotai liquor. His body swayed to and fro—he was drunk again!

“Alcohol, where’s my alcohol? Give me some more!” Just as before, he began to ask for alcohol from the crowd.

However, no one dared throw fake liquor to him now. Xu Que had drunk ten bottles of Ten-Millenium Maotai liquor—far more than what he had drunk before. He was severely intoxicated; he had lost his sanity.

Ling Feng stood desperately at the edge of the ring. He dared not make a single noise, but quietly shifted closer and closer to the edge of the Life and Death Ring.

He would rather jump off the stage and admit defeat than be beaten up by Xu Que again. Apart from losing his reputation and prestige, the real rationale for admitting defeat was because it was just too painful!

If he hadn’t enriched and trained his flesh and body, he would have died in his first battle, beaten to death by Xu Que’s fists. He would never have had the chance to wait for the old housekeeper to give him medicine.

“Young City Governor, get down quickly!” At the same time, those outside the ring were urging Ling Feng to get off the battleground.

“Yes, come down quickly! There’s no need to battle again!”

“He’s a monster! You can’t beat him!”

“Oh yes, Young City Governor, don’t use your Amethyst Blaze Lightsaber Sword Art anymore! That dude is quite sensitive to purple!”

“Yes, yes, he shouted for Zi Xia just now, it might be a kind of light or a treasure, or even a name.”

“That won’t do. If he doesn’t use his Magic Art, what if that dude started his attack, is he going to do nothing? ”

“Pssshh, from the previous battle, do you think the Young City Governor has a chance to fight back?”

“Uh…I’m sorry, sorry, sorry to interrupt!”

Many people gave Ling Feng advice to help him escape from Xu Que’s vicious attack.

While Ling Feng was listening to their discussion, he had an idea, “Before, it was because the Amethyst Blaze Lightsaber stimulated him. If I changed the color, I might be all right!” When he thought of that, Ling Feng immediately stretched out his palm to the sword! Blood immediately covered the blade of the sword, but he wasn’t going to attack Xu Que. Instead, he was preventing the purple light from appearing again if he was to defend himself against Xu Que’s attack. He used his blood to cover the purple light!

“Hong Yan? Hong Yan? Is that you?” Just then, Xu Que suddenly turned his head to Ling Feng and shouted excitedly.

Whoosh!

In an instant, Ling Feng was dumbfounded and almost vomited blood.

D*mn it! After Zi Xia it’s Hong Yan?

Are you a collector of seven colors from the rainbow?

Whoosh!

Without a moment’s hesitation, Ling Feng threw away his sword and tried to lure Xu Que away. At the same time, Ling Feng darted to the bottom of the Life and Death Ring.

“Stop! What are you doing?”

Almost at the same time, Xu Que roared at him. Then he stared at Ling Feng with a furious face and hollered, “How dare you throw my Hong Yan? D*mn it, you’re in deep sh*t!”

Then he started walking with a strange pace as he staggered and plunged onto the ground. Xu Que disappeared from his original spot and appeared in front of Ling Feng in an instant. At the same time, he held up his fist.

“D*mn it!” Ling Feng was so angry that he cursed instantly.

Subsequently, they heard a loud bang, and Ling Feng was harshly thrown onto the ground. It was followed by a heavy kick from Xu Que, and Ling Feng instantly flew across the Life and Death Ring.

Bang!

Bang!

Bang!

There was a series of rhythmic sounds and Ling Feng was being beaten back and forth like a ball on a rope. Everyone on the scene sighed to themselves, What a familiar scene!

Then they saw Ling Feng flying across the sky, with a face of despair and angry and helpless tears. With a plaintive cry; he had given up struggling!

Bang!

Eventually, after more than an hour, Ling Feng was thrown out of the Life and Death Ring by Xu Que again. He fell heavily on the ground and was unconscious. Almost at the same time, Xu Que staggered in the Life and Death Ring, dropped directly to the ground, and fell asleep.

“Quick! Save the Young City Governor!” Just then, the old housekeeper finally collected himself and cried out. A group of guards and servants from the City Governor’s Mansion immediately rushed up and helped Ling Feng. The old housekeeper took out a precious medicine and put it into Ling Feng’s mouth.

A moment later, Ling Feng woke up in confusion again. He realized that he was being rescued again, and he almost started crying.

“D*mn! Why did you save me! Why did you wake me up?”

“Ah!” At the same time, Xu Que’s voice could be heard from the Life and Death Ring.

He sat up, stretched his back and muscles, and looked around with a perplexed expression again. The next moment, he stood up from the ground and shouted, “What’s going on? Why am I alone? Where’s Ling Feng, where’s our fair battle? Hurry up, I’m waiting for you!”

Hiss!

In an instant, everyone gasped in disbelief.

That dude…he blacked out from drinking too much again!

Everyone was sympathizing with Ling Feng.

Ling Feng was flabbergasted, and. without hesitation, he slapped his own forehead.

Bang!

With a muffled sound, Ling Feng was knocked unconscious and fell into the arms of many guards and servants.

“Quickly, send the Young City Governor back to his home to recuperate!”

The old housekeeper was more quick-witted this time. He made a prompt decision and immediately shouted. Many guards and servants immediately lifted Ling Feng, quickly squeezed out of the crowd, and fled in the direction of the City Governor’s Mansion.

“Hey, hey hey, who was that man who was beaten badly? Where did Ling Feng go? Did any of you see him?” Just then, Xu Que stood up in the ring and shouted.

Many onlookers were feeling helpless, and some were still laughing bitterly.

“Younger brother, stop looking, you’ve beaten him twice in a row.” Just then, Qin Susu couldn’t bear watching the scene anymore so she engaged in soundless communication to inform Xu Que.

Xu Que was startled, “I’ve beaten him twice? No way! How come I don’t have any memory of that?”

Ding! “After evaluation, the Host lost his memories twice because of alcohol, do you want to recover them?” The System prompted.

“Dmn it, I blacked out twice?” Xu Que immediately responded. “Quick, show it to me!”

Whoosh!

The System instantly activated the automatic recovery ability to repair the missing memory.

Xu Que squinted as he reviewed all that he had just done. He was thrilled. He realized it was fun to be drunk and act crazy. The key was that his Drunken Immortal Fist was especially interesting! Its power was simply amazing. If his body was stronger, it could be more powerful than any Celestial Artifact.

“Young chap, young chap, come down!” Just then, a voice from an old man called out to him.

Xu Que turned and looked around. He saw a kind old man in a white robe, standing beside Qin Susu, waving at him.

“Are you calling me?” Xu Que was startled. He jumped off the Life and Death Ring. He scrutinized the old man with a suspicious gaze.

“Yes, yes, I have something to ask you. I wonder where did you come from? Do you have any elders at home? Are you engaged or married?” The white-robed old man greeted Xu Que warmly and kindly and asked three questions in one go!

chapters.title: Chapter 1162 - The Holy Ground, Jade Lake
chapters.body:
Chapter 1162 - The Holy Ground, Jade Lake

Chapter 1162: The Holy Ground, Jade Lake

“Huh?” Xu Que opened his eyes wide and glanced at the old man in the white robe. Then he ignored him. He looked directly at Qin Susu and asked, “Is this your father?”

“Bah, what’s wrong with your eyes? Is your elder sister that old? This is my great-great-great grandfather!” Qin Susu was immediately annoyed.

“Great-great-great grandfather?” Xu Que looked at the old man in the white robe and was somewhat astonished. The old man’s Cultivation Stage was unpredictable and his aura was powerful. At first glance, he seemed to be in the Medium Stage of the Earth Celestial Stage, but, in fact, he was far higher than the Earth Celestial Stage. It was difficult to determine his actual strength.

Such a powerful figure and he was the great-great-great grandfather of Qin Susu. Clearly, Qin Susu’s family background wasn’t simple!

“This old man here is Qin Sanli, I wonder if my little friend has ever heard about me?” Just then, the white-robed old man laughed and asked kindly.

“Grab three balls? Wow, you’re awesome. You can catch three at a time. It’s not easy. It’s extraordinary!” Xu Que was shocked.

“My little friend is very kind!” Qin Sanli didn’t understand Xu Que’s underlying meaning at all. He could only take it as praise.

“Elder Qin is kind and approachable, this is rare! I’m the Exploding Heavens Faction’s Bai Zhantang. There are no elders in my house, but I have a sister and…uh, wait a minute, I’ll count first,…one, two, three, four, five, well, I have eight fiancees!” Xu Que gave a truthful account.

On one hand, he thought the elderly man was really nice and amiable and not as arrogant like other strong aces. On the other hand, he also wanted to try to find out whether he could inquire from Qin Susu and the elderly man about the location of Jade Lake or information about Jiang Hongyan and the others!

“Eight wives? Younger brother, I didn’t know that you were that popular!” Qin Susu was shocked and then laughed.

“Uh, Su Su, you shouldn’t say that. I had at least ten companions when I was young too. It’s not about popularity, and this young chap Bai said that he hasn’t married anyone of them. You still have a chance…let go, let go, let go, I’ll stop, you quickly let go of my beard!” Qin Sanli was pouring out words, but before he could finish, Qin Susu grabbed his long beard and stamped on her foot anxiously.

“Humph, this time I’ll pull out a few strands of your beard. If you dare to talk nonsense, I’ll pull it all out!” Qin Susu was annoyed, but she let go of his beard.

“Ouch, my poor old beard!” Qin Sanli covered his chin and rubbed it several times before he looked at Xu Que. He was embarrassed and said, “The old man’s granddaughter is really bossy. Sorry to let you see such a scene. In fact, she isn’t usually like that.”

Isn’t usually like that?

Xu Que was amused. I suppose this girl’s usual behavior could be worse than just now?

But he didn’t continue this conversation. He smiled and asked, “Elder, are there any other reasons for asking me over?”

“Ha, ha, I saw your extraordinary strength and how you made a name for yourself in just one fight. I wanted to invite you over to have tea. I wonder if you would give me a chance?” Qin Sanli laughed and looked at Xu Que.

“Drink tea…all right! Let’s go!” Xu Que hesitated a little, but nodded his head and agreed.

Originally, he wanted to take a tour of the City Governor’s Mansion to reap more benefits, but it was rare to encounter such a talkative ace. He must do him a favor, have a cup of tea with him, and then inquire about some information.

When Qin Sanli heard Xu Que’s answer, he was immediately on cloud nine. He led Xu Que to a teahouse nearby.

“Susu, I just remembered that before your great-great grandpa seemed to be looking for you. Why don’t you go back first!” When he arrived at the entrance of the teahouse, Qin Sanli found a poor excuse to dismiss Qin Susu. Qin Susu naturally guessed what Qin Sanli was up to, but she didn’t care enough to expose him. Instead, she stared at Xu Que and engaged in soundless communication as she said, “Younger brother, no matter what the old man says, do not promise him, otherwise…ha, ha, I’ll kill you!”

“Oh my, d*mn it!” Xu Que was unhappy to hear that.

Are you kidding me, who do you think you are? How are you capable of killing me? What kind of game do you want to play, tell me about it?

“I’m leaving!” Finally, Qin Susu gave Xu Que a warning glare, bid farewell, and left.

Qin Sanli smiled at Xu Que and said, “Young chap, my granddaughter is like this. Don’t mind her. She must have said something to you just now. Just ignore her. Let’s talk about our business! Let’s go!”

After that, Qin Sanli warmly welcomed Xu Que into the teahouse.

They sat in a small room. After the shopkeeper had finished serving their tea and left the room, Qin Sanli was impatient as he asked, “What do you think of our Susu?”

“Uh…Elder, that’s a bit too straightforward. I’d better give you a tactful reply—she’s not too good!” Xu Que rolled his eyes and replied. He then picked up a cup and drank his tea.

Qin Sanli was dumbfounded and couldn’t continue the conversation. Obviously, he wasn’t expecting Xu Que to give such an answer.

A tactful reply yet she’s still not good enough?

If it isn’t a tactful reply, wouldn’t it be worse?

“Young chap, you shouldn’t be so superficial. In fact, my granddaughter is very good-natured,” Qin Sanli explained quickly.

“Don’t look at the surface? Then it’s even worse!” Xu Que shook his head and said, “Elder, you’d better not go round and round. Speak frankly, do you want me to marry your granddaughter?”

“Uh…” Qin Sanli was caught off-guard once again. He didn’t expect Xu Que to be so direct, but that was really his intention.

After a period of silence, Qin Sanli simply nodded, “Since you want to get to the point, then I shall speak my mind. Over the years, I’ve seen countless aces but have never seen such a talented and outstanding young man like you. And for Susu, a person with high expectations of those around her, yet she can be so close to you. It certainly implies that you have a good personality and are excellent in other aspects too. I think you’re a good candidate.”

A good personality and excellent in other aspects?

Xu Que nodded his head approvingly when he heard that. “Elder, I have to say this, you have an accurate judgment of people. But I’m afraid I can’t accept your suggestion!”

“Oh? What’s troubling you? You can tell me. I have some power in the Zhen Yuan Celestial Realm, maybe I can help you solve it!” Qin Sanli asked immediately.

“Uh, it can’t be solved!” Xu Que sighed and shook his head. “I’m separated from my eight fiancees and a cute puppy too. Before I find them, I really don’t have the time to think about anything else.”

Speaking of that, Xu Que’s eyes flashed with a tinge of sadness and longing. The sadness was fake, but his longing was real!

When Qin Sanli saw Xu Que’s expression, he immediately got serious and said earnestly, “Don’t be anxious. Where were you separated from them? I have friends all over the world. Maybe they can help!”

“Uh, I don’t know!” Xu Que sighed again and said, “I only know that my wives may have gone to a place called Jade Lake. Unfortunately, I already know that none of the sects in the Zhen Yuan Celestial Realm are called Jade Lake. So I have to find them in the other four Celestial Realms and maybe even the Heaven Continent!”

“Jade Lake?” Qin Sanli was stunned and he frowned. “Young chap, are you sure that your wives went to the Jade Lake?”

“Elder, do you know Jade Lake?” Xu Que was startled and then filled with surprise.

He didn’t have much hope, but from the tone of Qin Sanli, he definitely knew Jade Lake!

“Yes, the Holy Ground, Jade Lake, one of the Great Ten Ancient Gates, how could I not know? But…” While Qin Sanli explained, he smiled bitterly and looked at Xu Que. “Young chap, this Jade Lake is located in the Heaven Continent. If you want to find them, I’m afraid it’s impossible!”
